name: OperationDescriptorAndEnvelope
description: The authoritative public operation registry, common envelopes, wire primitives, exit categories, and stable cross-operation errors.
schema_def: - errors: complete stable code/category/exit set for the operation
- actor: required {kind: agent|human|system, label: non-empty safe text, runId?: text}
- idempotencyKey: required for mutations, supplied by --idempotency-key and excluded from JSON input

Constraints: one JSON object on stdout; diagnostics on stderr only; unknown fields rejected; no database types, paths, SQL, exception text, financial payloads, or secrets in errors. Mutation replay returns the stored byte-equivalent logical result.
- TALLY-USAGE-001 malformed JSON, missing input, unknown option: usage, exit 2
- TALLY-CONTRACT-001 unknown field or schema violation: usage, exit 2
- TALLY-VALIDATION-001 invalid field value: validation, exit 3
- TALLY-CONTRACT-002 unsupported contract version: incompatible, exit 7
- LEDGER-IDEMPOTENCY-001 same key with different operation or normalized input: conflict, exit 5
- LEDGER-STORAGE-001 writer/store busy before transaction acquisition: conflict, exit 5
- LEDGER-STORAGE-002 newer or incompatible storage generation: incompatible, exit 7
- LEDGER-INTEGRITY-001 integrity invariant failed: integrity, exit 8
- LEDGER-HOST-001 permission, protection, space, or host-resource failure: host, exit 9
- TALLY-INTERNAL-001 sanitized unexpected failure with correlation reference: internal, exit 10
- Money: canonical signed two-decimal string plus currencyCode=ZAR; never JSON number
- actor and immutable outcome are persisted so replay is stable
Descriptor data is the sole generator for help, schema, dispatch, conformance tests, and skill manifests.
